controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable from immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall be applicable from immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable from immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (credit derivatives) directions, 2026
controls.control_description:
(i) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Credit Derivatives) Directions, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (credit derivatives) directions, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to credit derivatives transactions undertaken in over- the-counter (otc) markets and on recognised stock exchanges in india
controls.control_description:
(ii) These Directions shall apply to credit derivatives transactions undertaken in Over-
the-Counter (OTC) markets and on recognised stock exchanges in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to credit derivatives transactions undertaken in over- the-counter (otc) markets and on recognised stock exchanges in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force on june 25, 2026
controls.control_description: (iii) These Directions shall come into force on June 25, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force on june 25, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure a settlement process in which the price of the reference/deliverable obligation at which the settlement will happen is determined through an auction m
controls.control_description:
(a) 'Auction settlement' of CDS means a settlement process in which the price of
the reference/deliverable obligation at which the settlement will happen is
determined through an auction mechanism.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a settlement process in which the price of the reference/deliverable obligation at which the settlement will happen is determined through an auction m

controls.control_objective: To ensure a settlement process in which the protection seller pays to the protection buyer, the notional amount of the cds contract less the expected recovery v
controls.control_description:
(b) 'Cash settlement' of CDS means a settlement process in which the protection
seller pays to the protection buyer, the notional amount of the CDS contract less
the expected recovery value of the reference obligation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a settlement process in which the protection seller pays to the protection buyer, the notional amount of the cds contract less the expected recovery v

controls.control_objective: To ensure an entity that interposes itself between counterparties to contracts traded in one or more financial markets, becoming the buyer to every seller and t
controls.control_description:
(c) 'Central counterparty' means an entity that interposes itself between
counterparties to contracts traded in one or more financial markets, becoming
the buyer to every seller and the seller to every buyer and thereby ensuring the
performance of open contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an entity that interposes itself between counterparties to contracts traded in one or more financial markets, becoming the buyer to every seller and t

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)
controls.control_description:
(d) 'Company' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section 2(20) of the
Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(e) 'Corporate bonds and debentures' mean non-convertible debt securities which
create or acknowledge indebtedness and include debentures, bonds and such
other securities issued by a body corporate or a trust or any statutory body
constituted by virtue of a legislation, whether constituting a charge on the assets
of the issuer or not, but excludes money market debt instruments, security
receipts, securitised debt instruments and bonds issued by the Central
Government or a State Government, or such other persons as may be specified
by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure a credit derivative contract in which one counterparty (protection seller) commits to pay to the other counterparty (protection buyer) in the case of
controls.control_description:
(f) 'Credit Default Swap (CDS)' means a credit derivative contract in which one
counterparty (protection seller) commits to pay to the other counterparty
(protection buyer) in the case of a credit event with respect to a reference entity
and in return, the protection buyer makes periodic payments (premium) to the
protection seller until the maturity of the contract or the credit event, whichever
is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a credit derivative contract in which one counterparty (protection seller) commits to pay to the other counterparty (protection buyer) in the case of

controls.control_objective: To ensure a derivative contract whose value is derived from the credit risk of an underlying debt instrument or from an index of underlying debt instruments
controls.control_description:
(g) 'Credit derivative' means a derivative contract whose value is derived from the
credit risk of an underlying debt instrument or from an index of underlying debt
instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a derivative contract whose value is derived from the credit risk of an underlying debt instrument or from an index of underlying debt instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure a pre-defined event in a credit derivative contract, which triggers a settlement under the contract
controls.control_description:
(h) 'Credit event' means a pre-defined event in a credit derivative contract, which
triggers a settlement under the contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a pre-defined event in a credit derivative contract, which triggers a settlement under the contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure a debt instrument issued by the reference entity that the protection buyer can deliver to the protection seller in a physically settled cds contract
controls.control_description:
(i) 'Deliverable obligation' means a debt instrument issued by the reference entity
that the protection buyer can deliver to the protection seller in a physically settled
CDS contract, in case of occurrence of a credit event.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a debt instrument issued by the reference entity that the protection buyer can deliver to the protection seller in a physically settled cds contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 2 (iii) of master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) directions, 20
controls.control_description:
(j) 'Electronic Trading Platform (ETP)' shall have the same meaning as assigned to
it in Paragraph 2 (iii) of Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Electronic
Trading Platforms) Directions, 2025 dated January 16, 2025, as amended from
time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 2 (iii) of master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) directions, 20

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean 'recognised stock exchange' and shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the securities contract regulation act, 1956 (42
controls.control_description:
(k) 'Exchange' shall mean 'recognised stock exchange' and shall have the same
meaning as assigned to it in Section 2(f) of the Securities Contract Regulation
Act, 1956 (42 of 1956).

controls.control_objective: To ensure a standardised derivative contract, traded on a recognised stock exchange, to buy or sell an index of underlying debt instruments at a specified futur
controls.control_description:
(l) 'Future on credit indices' means a standardised derivative contract, traded on a
recognised stock exchange, to buy or sell an index of underlying debt
instruments at a specified future date, at a price determined at the time of the
contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a standardised derivative contract, traded on a recognised stock exchange, to buy or sell an index of underlying debt instruments at a specified futur

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 9 of indian accounting standard (ind as) 24: related party disclosures
controls.control_description:
(m) 'Government-related entity' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in
Paragraph 9 of Indian Accounting Standard (Ind AS) 24: Related Party
Disclosures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 9 of indian accounting standard (ind as) 24: related party disclosures

controls.control_objective: To ensure the activity of undertaking a credit derivative transaction to reduce credit risk of a particular debt instrument or a portfolio of debt instruments
controls.control_description:
(n) 'Hedging' means the activity of undertaking a credit derivative transaction to
reduce credit risk of a particular debt instrument or a portfolio of debt
instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the activity of undertaking a credit derivative transaction to reduce credit risk of a particular debt instrument or a portfolio of debt instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company engaged primarily in activities related to specific infrastructure sub-sectors listed under the harmonized master list of infrastructure sub
controls.control_description:
(o) 'Infrastructure company' means a company engaged primarily in activities
related to specific infrastructure sub-sectors listed under the Harmonized Master
List of Infrastructure Sub-sectors notified by Department of Economic Affairs,
Ministry of Finance, Government of India, via gazette notification no.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company engaged primarily in activities related to specific infrastructure sub-sectors listed under the harmonized master list of infrastructure sub

controls.control_objective: To ensure an entity which provides prices to users and other market- makers
controls.control_description:
(p) 'Market-maker' means an entity which provides prices to users and other market-
makers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an entity which provides prices to users and other market- makers

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(57) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)
controls.control_description:
(r) 'Net worth' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section 2(57) of the
Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(57) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)

controls.control_objective: To ensure include electronic trading platforms (etps)
controls.control_description:
(s) 'Over-the-Counter (OTC) markets' mean the markets where transactions are
undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and shall include electronic
trading platforms (ETPs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include electronic trading platforms (etps)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(w) of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 of 1999)
controls.control_description:
(t) 'Person resident outside India' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in
Section 2(w) of Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (42 of 1999).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(w) of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 of 1999)

controls.control_objective: To ensure a settlement process in which the protection buyer delivers any of the eligible deliverable obligations to the protection seller against the receipt o
controls.control_description:
(u) 'Physical settlement' of CDS means a settlement process in which the protection
buyer delivers any of the eligible deliverable obligations to the protection seller
against the receipt of notional amount of the CDS contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a settlement process in which the protection buyer delivers any of the eligible deliverable obligations to the protection seller against the receipt o

controls.control_objective: To ensure a debt instrument issued by a reference entity or an index of underlying debt instruments and specified in a total return swap contract
controls.control_description:
(v) 'Reference asset' means a debt instrument issued by a reference entity or an
index of underlying debt instruments and specified in a total return swap contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a debt instrument issued by a reference entity or an index of underlying debt instruments and specified in a total return swap contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure an entity, against whose credit risk, a credit derivative contract is entered into
controls.control_description:
(w) 'Reference entity' means an entity, against whose credit risk, a credit derivative
contract is entered into.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an entity, against whose credit risk, a credit derivative contract is entered into

controls.control_objective: To ensure a debt instrument issued by the reference entity and specified in a cds contract for the purpose of valuation of the contract and for determining the
controls.control_description:
(x) 'Reference obligation' means a debt instrument issued by the reference entity
and specified in a CDS contract for the purpose of valuation of the contract and
for determining the cash settlement value or the deliverable obligation in case of
occurrence of a credit event.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a debt instrument issued by the reference entity and specified in a cds contract for the purpose of valuation of the contract and for determining the

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under paragraph 9 of indian accounting standard (ind as) 24 - related party disclosures
controls.control_description:
(y) 'Related party' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Paragraph
9 of Indian Accounting Standard (Ind AS) 24 - Related Party Disclosures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under paragraph 9 of indian accounting standard (ind as) 24 - related party disclosures

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a 'person resident in india' and shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(v) of the foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 o
controls.control_description:
(z) 'Resident' shall mean a 'person resident in India' and shall have the same
meaning as assigned to it in section 2(v) of the Foreign Exchange Management
Act, 1999 (42 of 1999).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a 'person resident in india' and shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(v) of the foreign exchange management act, 1999 (42 o

controls.control_objective: To ensure a cds contract in which the underlying is a single reference entity
controls.control_description:
(aa) 'Single-name CDS' means a CDS contract in which the underlying is a single
reference entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a cds contract in which the underlying is a single reference entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure any event that results in the reference obligation being replaced by another obligation issued by the reference entity
controls.control_description:
(bb) 'Substitution event' means any event that results in the reference obligation
being replaced by another obligation issued by the reference entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any event that results in the reference obligation being replaced by another obligation issued by the reference entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure any event that results in the reference entity no longer being the primary obligor for the reference obligation
controls.control_description:
(cc) 'Succession event' means any event that results in the reference entity no longer
being the primary obligor for the reference obligation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any event that results in the reference entity no longer being the primary obligor for the reference obligation

controls.control_objective: To ensure a credit derivative contract under which one counterparty (total return payer) commits to transfer the entire economic performance of a reference asse
controls.control_description:
(dd) 'Total Return Swap (TRS)' means a credit derivative contract under which one
counterparty (total return payer) commits to transfer the entire economic
performance of a reference asset to the other counterparty (total return receiver),
and, in return, receives a pre-determined fixed or floating rate linked to a
benchmark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a credit derivative contract under which one counterparty (total return payer) commits to transfer the entire economic performance of a reference asse

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person that undertakes derivative transactions other than as a market-maker
controls.control_description:
(ee) 'User' means a person that undertakes derivative transactions other than as a
market-maker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person that undertakes derivative transactions other than as a market-maker

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or in fema, 1999
controls.control_description:
(ii) Words and expressions, used but not defined in these Directions, shall have the
same meaning as assigned to them in the Act or in FEMA, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or in fema, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to participate in credit derivatives market:
controls.control_description: (i) The following persons shall be eligible to participate in credit derivatives market:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to participate in credit derivatives market:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be published by a financial benchmark administrator which is duly authorised by the reserve bank under the reserve bank of india (financial benchmark
controls.control_description:
Directions on credit derivatives in the OTC market
Note: An index which is based wholly or partially on money market debt instruments
shall be published by a financial benchmark administrator which is duly authorised
by the Reserve Bank under the Reserve Bank of India (Financial Benchmark
Administrators) Directions, 2023 dated December 28, 2023, as amended from time
to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be published by a financial benchmark administrator which is duly authorised by the reserve bank under the reserve bank of india (financial benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake transactions in cds and trs contracts
controls.control_description:
4.1 Permitted products
Market-makers and users may undertake transactions in CDS and TRS contracts, subject
to the directions specified hereinafter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake transactions in cds and trs contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to act as market-makers in credit derivatives:
controls.control_description: (i) The following entities shall be eligible to act as market-makers in credit derivatives:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to act as market-makers in credit derivatives:

controls.control_objective: To ensure cease to act as a market-maker
controls.control_description:
(ii) In case an NBFC fails to meet the eligibility criteria for acting as a market-maker, it
shall cease to act as a market-maker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cease to act as a market-maker

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to meet all its obligations under the existing contracts till the maturity/termination of such contracts
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall continue to meet all its
obligations under the existing contracts till the maturity/termination of such contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to meet all its obligations under the existing contracts till the maturity/termination of such contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a market-maker or a central counterparty authorised by the reserve bank for the purpose
controls.control_description:
(iii) At least one of the parties to a credit derivative transaction shall be a market-maker
or a central counterparty authorised by the Reserve Bank for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a market-maker or a central counterparty authorised by the reserve bank for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified by market-makers either as retail or non-retail for the purpose of offering credit derivative contracts
controls.control_description:
(i) Users shall be classified by market-makers either as retail or non-retail for the purpose
of offering credit derivative contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified by market-makers either as retail or non-retail for the purpose of offering credit derivative contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:
controls.control_description: (ii) The following users shall be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as a retail user
controls.control_description:
(iii) Any user who is not eligible to be classified as a non-retail user shall be classified as
a retail user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as a retail user

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to get classified as a retail user
controls.control_description:
(iv) Any user who is otherwise eligible to be classified as a non-retail user shall have the
option to get classified as a retail user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to get classified as a retail user

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to buy protection only for the purpose of hedging
controls.control_description:
(i) A resident retail user, other than an individual, shall be allowed to buy protection only
for the purpose of hedging.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to buy protection only for the purpose of hedging

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to buy protection without any restriction in terms of purpose
controls.control_description:
(ii) A non-retail user shall be allowed to buy protection without any restriction in terms of
purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to buy protection without any restriction in terms of purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to act as protection sellers:
controls.control_description: (iii) The following non-retail users shall be eligible to act as protection sellers:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to act as protection sellers:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to act as protection sellers subject to approval of their respective regulator
controls.control_description:
(iv) Insurance Companies, Pension Funds, Mutual Funds and Alternative Investment
Funds mentioned under Paragraph 4.3.1(iii) shall be permitted to act as protection
sellers subject to approval of their respective regulator.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to act as protection sellers subject to approval of their respective regulator

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following
controls.control_description: (v) Participation by FPIs in CDS contracts shall be subject to the following,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to a limit of 5 per cent of the outstanding stock of corporate bonds
controls.control_description:
(a) The notional amount of CDS protection sold by all FPIs shall be subject to a limit
of 5 per cent of the outstanding stock of corporate bonds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be subject to a limit of 5 per cent of the outstanding stock of corporate bonds

controls.control_objective: To ensure disseminate the utilisation of the limit based on the reporting by the market makers in terms of paragraph 4
controls.control_description:
(CCIL) shall disseminate the utilisation of the limit based on the
reporting by the market makers in terms of Paragraph 4.5.5 of these directions
and reporting by stock exchanges in terms of Paragraph 6.1 (vii) of these
directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to disseminate the utilisation of the limit based on the reporting by the market makers in terms of paragraph 4

controls.control_objective: To ensure sell any further cds protection once the limit is utilised
controls.control_description: FPIs shall not sell any further CDS protection once the limit is utilised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to sell any further cds protection once the limit is utilised

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned under the investment limits for corporate bonds as specified in in a
controls.control_description:
(b) Debt instruments received by FPIs as deliverable obligation and debt instruments
purchased by FPIs for meeting deliverable obligation in physical settlement of
CDS contracts shall be reckoned under the investment limits for corporate bonds
as specified in in A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned under the investment limits for corporate bonds as specified in in a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adjusted against the revised limit in the subsequent review of investment limit
controls.control_description:
In case of non-availability of investment limit at the
time of physical settlement, such debt instruments shall be adjusted against the
revised limit in the subsequent review of investment limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be adjusted against the revised limit in the subsequent review of investment limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the minimum residual maturity requirement or issue-wise limit applicable to fpi investment in corporate bonds as specified in master dir
controls.control_description:
(c) The notional amount of protection sold by FPIs, and the debt instruments
received as deliverable obligation as well as debt instruments purchased for
meeting deliverable obligation by FPIs in physical settlement of CDS contracts
shall not be subject to the minimum residual maturity requirement or issue-wise
limit applicable to FPI investment in corporate bonds as specified in Master
Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Non-resident Investment in Debt Instruments)
Directions, 2025, dated January 7, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be subject to the minimum residual maturity requirement or issue-wise limit applicable to fpi investment in corporate bonds as specified in master dir

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer a cds contract to an fpi where the reference obligation or the index includes a money market debt instrument or a debt instrument with residual
controls.control_description:
(d) A market maker shall not offer a CDS contract to an FPI where the reference
obligation or the index includes a money market debt instrument or a debt
instrument with residual maturity less than one year or a bond with call / put
options exercisable within one year from the date of the undertaking the CDS
contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer a cds contract to an fpi where the reference obligation or the index includes a money market debt instrument or a debt instrument with residual

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer cds contracts to an individual
controls.control_description: (vi) A market-maker shall not offer CDS contracts to an individual.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer cds contracts to an individual

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer a trs contract to a resident retail user, other than an individual, only for the purpose of hedging
controls.control_description:
(i) A market-maker may offer a TRS contract to a resident retail user, other than an
individual, only for the purpose of hedging.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer a trs contract to a resident retail user, other than an individual, only for the purpose of hedging

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer a trs contract to a resident non-retail user without any restriction in terms of purpose
controls.control_description:
(ii) A market-maker may offer a TRS contract to a resident non-retail user without any
restriction in terms of purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer a trs contract to a resident non-retail user without any restriction in terms of purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer a trs contract to a person outside india subject to the following:
controls.control_description:
(iii) A market-maker may offer a TRS contract to a person outside India subject to the
following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer a trs contract to a person outside india subject to the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer a trs contract to a person resident outside india, including an fpi, for the purpose of hedging
controls.control_description:
(a) A market-maker may offer a TRS contract to a person resident outside India,
including an FPI, for the purpose of hedging;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer a trs contract to a person resident outside india, including an fpi, for the purpose of hedging

controls.control_objective: To ensure the trs is offered as a fully funded structure in which the person resident outside india provides to the market-maker in india the full notional amou
controls.control_description:
(b) A market maker may also offer a TRS contract to a person resident outside
India, including an FPI, wherein the person resident outside India is the total
return receiver provided that the TRS is offered as a fully funded structure in
which the person resident outside India provides to the market-maker in India
the full notional amount of the reference asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the trs is offered as a fully funded structure in which the person resident outside india provides to the market-maker in india the full notional amou

controls.control_objective: To ensure be written by the person resident outside india
controls.control_description:
Provided that no offshore derivative instrument with the TRS contract as
underlying shall be written by the person resident outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be written by the person resident outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer a trs contract to a person resident outside india, including an fpi, directly or on a back-to-back basis through overseas entities (including overseas branches
controls.control_description:
(c) A market maker may offer a TRS contract to a person resident outside India,
including an FPI, directly or on a back-to-back basis through overseas entities
(including overseas branches, IFSC Banking Units, wholly owned subsidiaries
and joint ventures of market-makers) subject to the following conditions:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer a trs contract to a person resident outside india, including an fpi, directly or on a back-to-back basis through overseas entities (including overseas branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide information, data or any other particulars required by the reserve bank of india in respect of the aforesaid transactions in the manner and ti
controls.control_description:
The market-maker shall provide information, data or any other particulars
required by the Reserve Bank of India in respect of the aforesaid
transactions in the manner and time prescribed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide information, data or any other particulars required by the reserve bank of india in respect of the aforesaid transactions in the manner and ti

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned under the investment limits for corporate bonds as specified in master direction - reserve bank of india (non-resident investment in debt
controls.control_description:
(d) The notional amount of the TRS contract offered to a person resident outside
India through a fully funded structure shall be reckoned under the investment
limits for corporate bonds as specified in Master Direction - Reserve Bank of
India (Non-resident Investment in Debt Instruments) Directions, 2025, dated
January 7, 2025, as amended from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned under the investment limits for corporate bonds as specified in master direction - reserve bank of india (non-resident investment in debt

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the end use restrictions set out in paragraph 4
controls.control_description:
(e) Where the reference asset specified in a TRS contract includes an unlisted
corporate bond or debenture, the same shall comply with the end use
restrictions set out in Paragraph 4.4 (vi) of the Master Direction - Reserve Bank
of India (Non-resident Investment in Debt Instruments) Directions, 2025, dated
January 7, 2025;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the end use restrictions set out in paragraph 4

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer a trs contract to a person resident outside india where the reference asset or the index includes a money market debt instrument or a debt instr
controls.control_description:
(f) A market maker shall not offer a TRS contract to a person resident outside India
where the reference asset or the index includes a money market debt
instrument or a debt instrument with residual maturity less than one year or a
bond with call / put options exercisable within one year from the date of the
contract;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer a trs contract to a person resident outside india where the reference asset or the index includes a money market debt instrument or a debt instr

controls.control_description: (iv) A market-maker shall not offer a TRS contract to an individual.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer a trs contract to an individual

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a resident entity who is eligible to issue any of the debt instruments mentioned under paragraph 4
controls.control_description:
(i) The reference entity in a credit derivative contract shall be a resident entity who is
eligible to issue any of the debt instruments mentioned under Paragraph 4.4 (ii).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a resident entity who is eligible to issue any of the debt instruments mentioned under paragraph 4

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to be a reference obligation in a cds contract or a reference asset in a trs contract:
controls.control_description:
(ii) The following debt instruments issued in India shall be eligible to be a reference
obligation in a CDS contract or a reference asset in a TRS contract:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to be reference obligations/reference assets
controls.control_description:
(iii) Bonds with call/put options shall be eligible to be reference obligations/reference
assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to be reference obligations/reference assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted as reference obligations/reference assets
controls.control_description:
shall not be permitted
as reference obligations/reference assets.

controls.control_description:
(v) The reference obligation /deliverable obligation /reference asset shall be in
dematerialised form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in dematerialised form

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an index comprising solely of eligible debt instruments as set out in paragraph 4
controls.control_description:
(vi) The underlying reference obligation for a CDS or a reference asset for a TRS may
be an index comprising solely of eligible debt instruments as set out in Paragraph 4.4
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an index comprising solely of eligible debt instruments as set out in paragraph 4

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into cds or trs transactions if the reference entity is a related party to either counterparty
controls.control_description:
(i) Market participants shall not enter into CDS or TRS transactions if the reference entity
is a related party to either counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into cds or trs transactions if the reference entity is a related party to either counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as related parties for the purpose of these directions
controls.control_description:
However, two (or more) government-related
entities shall not be deemed as related parties for the purpose of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as related parties for the purpose of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake credit derivative transactions involving reference entities/reference obligations//reference assets
controls.control_description:
(ii) Unless specifically permitted in these directions, market participants shall not
undertake credit derivative transactions involving reference entities/reference
obligations//reference assets, if there are regulatory restrictions on such participants
assuming similar exposures in the cash market or in violation of any other regulatory
restriction, as may be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake credit derivative transactions involving reference entities/reference obligations//reference assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to credit derivative transactions undertaken in terms of these directions
controls.control_description:
However, provisions under Paragraph 2,
Paragraph 5.1 and Paragraph 5.2 of the above circular shall not apply to credit

controls.control_description:
The procedure for cash settlement and auction

Determinations Committee, as specified under Paragraph 5 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined by the credit derivatives determinations committee, as specified under paragraph 5 of these directions

controls.control_description:
TRS
contracts undertaken by a person resident outside India, who is not an FPI, shall be
cash settled.

December 28, 2023, as amended from time to time.

(ii) To ensure compliance with the above, market-makers may call for any relevant
information/documents from the user, who, in turn, shall be obliged to provide such

controls.control_objective: To ensure exit their credit derivative position within one month from the date they cease to have the underlying exposure
controls.control_description:
(iii) Users undertaking credit derivative transactions for the purpose of hedging shall exit

controls.control_description:
(i) The settlement basis and market conventions for credit derivative contracts shall be
specified by the Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives Association of India
(FIMMDA), in consultation with market participants and based on international best
practices.

controls.control_description:
FIMMDA may also prescribe standard documentation procedures for credit
derivative transactions.

the protection seller.

(i) Market-makers in OTC markets shall comply with the Master Direction - Reserve
Bank of India (Market-makers in OTC Derivatives) Directions, 2021 issued vide RBI
Circular No.

controls.control_objective: To ensure report all otc credit derivative transactions within 30 minutes of the transaction, to the trade repository of clearing corporation of india ltd
controls.control_description:
(i) Market-makers shall report all OTC credit derivative transactions within 30 minutes
of the transaction, to the trade repository of Clearing Corporation of India Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report all otc credit derivative transactions within 30 minutes of the transaction, to the trade repository of clearing corporation of india ltd

controls.control_objective: To ensure report all amendments, unwinding, novation, settlement transactions, and any credit, substitution or succession event to the trade repository of ccil
controls.control_description:
(ii) Market-makers shall report all amendments, unwinding, novation, settlement
transactions, and any credit, substitution or succession event to the trade repository
of CCIL.

controls.control_description:
(iii) The reporting formats shall be as indicated by CCIL with the prior approval of the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as indicated by ccil with the prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up a credit derivatives determinations committee, consisting of market-makers and users in credit derivatives as voting members
controls.control_description:
(i) FIMMDA shall set up a Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee, consisting of
market-makers and users in credit derivatives as voting members.

FIMMDA shall
ensure that users are adequately represented in the Committee.

controls.control_description:
The Committee may
also include central counterparties as observer members and legal/audit/consultancy
firms as consultative members.

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish rules for governing the activities of the credit derivatives determinations committee in line with international best practices
controls.control_description:
(ii) FIMMDA shall establish rules for governing the activities of the Credit Derivatives
Determinations Committee in line with international best practices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish rules for governing the activities of the credit derivatives determinations committee in line with international best practices

controls.control_objective: To ensure make factual determinations regarding key provisions of credit derivative contracts including, but not limited to, the occurrence of a credit event, s
controls.control_description:
(iii) The Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee, when approached by market
participants, shall make factual determinations regarding key provisions of credit
derivative contracts including, but not limited to, the occurrence of a credit event,
substitution event, succession event, determining the identity of successor reference
entity, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make factual determinations regarding key provisions of credit derivative contracts including, but not limited to, the occurrence of a credit event, s

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in consultation with market participants, develop a standard procedure for cash and auction settlement of cds contracts
controls.control_description:
(iv) The Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee shall, in consultation with market
participants, develop a standard procedure for cash and auction settlement of CDS
contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in consultation with market participants, develop a standard procedure for cash and auction settlement of cds contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct an auction to determine the reference price for settlement of cds contracts
controls.control_description:
(v) The Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee, when approached by market
participants, may conduct an auction to determine the reference price for settlement
of CDS contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct an auction to determine the reference price for settlement of cds contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place procedures/safeguards to ensure that the reference price is determined in a fair and transparent manner
controls.control_description:
The Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee shall put in
place procedures/safeguards to ensure that the reference price is determined in a
fair and transparent manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place procedures/safeguards to ensure that the reference price is determined in a fair and transparent manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be binding on the market participants
controls.control_description:
(vi) The decisions of the Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee shall be binding
on the market participants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be binding on the market participants

to time.

from time to time.

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer standardised single-name cds contracts and cds contracts on credit indices with guaranteed settlement
controls.control_description:
(i) Exchanges may offer standardised single-name CDS contracts and CDS contracts
on credit indices with guaranteed settlement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer standardised single-name cds contracts and cds contracts on credit indices with guaranteed settlement

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain prior approval of the reserve bank for product design, changes in product design, eligible participants and other details of cds contracts
controls.control_description:
(ii) Exchanges shall obtain prior approval of the Reserve Bank for product design,
changes in product design, eligible participants and other details of CDS contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain prior approval of the reserve bank for product design, changes in product design, eligible participants and other details of cds contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed by sebi
controls.control_description:
The operational guidelines on the procedure for execution and settlement of trades
on stock exchanges shall be prescribed by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed by sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as specified under paragraph 4
controls.control_description:
(iii) The reference entities and reference obligations for exchange-traded CDS shall be
as specified under Paragraph 4.4 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as specified under paragraph 4

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an index comprising solely of eligible debt instruments as set out in para 4.4 (ii) of these directions
controls.control_description:
(iv) The credit index for an exchange-traded CDS contract shall be an index comprising
solely of eligible debt instruments as set out in para 4.4 (ii) of these Directions,
subject to the condition that the index is published by a financial benchmark
administrator which is duly authorised by the Reserve Bank under the Reserve Bank
of India (Financial Benchmark Administrators) Directions, 2023 dated December 28,
2023, as amended from time to time, or that the index is composed / administered
as per the directions issued by SEBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an index comprising solely of eligible debt instruments as set out in para 4.4 (ii) of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure :
controls.control_description:
(i) Exchanges may offer futures contracts on credit indices with guaranteed settlement,
provided that:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to :

controls.control_objective: To ensure be composed solely of eligible debt instruments as set out in para 4
controls.control_description:
(a) The credit index used as underlying for futures contracts shall be composed
solely of eligible debt instruments as set out in para 4.4 (ii) of these directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be composed solely of eligible debt instruments as set out in para 4

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the directions issued by sebi
controls.control_description:
(b) The composition / administration of the index shall be as per the directions
issued by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the directions issued by sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the participants on exchanges are made adequately aware of the risks associated with credit derivative contracts
controls.control_description:
(i) Exchanges shall ensure that the participants on exchanges are made adequately
aware of the risks associated with credit derivative contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the participants on exchanges are made adequately aware of the risks associated with credit derivative contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake credit derivative transactions involving reference entities if there are regulatory restrictions on assuming similar exposures in the cash m
controls.control_description:
(ii) Participants shall not undertake credit derivative transactions involving reference
entities if there are regulatory restrictions on assuming similar exposures in the cash
market or in violation of any other regulatory restriction, as may be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake credit derivative transactions involving reference entities if there are regulatory restrictions on assuming similar exposures in the cash m

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish any information relating to credit derivative transactions to the reserve bank or any other agency as may be specified by the reserve bank in
controls.control_description:
(iii) Exchanges shall furnish any information relating to credit derivative transactions to
the Reserve Bank or any other agency as may be specified by the Reserve Bank in
the manner and format and within the time frame as may be specified by the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish any information relating to credit derivative transactions to the reserve bank or any other agency as may be specified by the reserve bank in

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place robust methodologies for marking to market credit derivative contracts
controls.control_description:
Valuation methodology
Market-makers shall put in place robust methodologies for marking to market credit
derivative contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place robust methodologies for marking to market credit derivative contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied consistently and shall be appropriately documented and disclosed
controls.control_description:
The valuation methodology adopted shall be applied consistently
and shall be appropriately documented and disclosed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied consistently and shall be appropriately documented and disclosed

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the applicable prudential norms and capital adequacy requirements for credit derivatives issued by their respective regulators
controls.control_description:
(i) Market participants shall follow the applicable prudential norms and capital adequacy
requirements for credit derivatives issued by their respective regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the applicable prudential norms and capital adequacy requirements for credit derivatives issued by their respective regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per notified and applicable accounting standards read with regulatory guidelines/instructions issued by the respective regulators
controls.control_description:
(ii) The accounting of credit derivative contracts by market participants shall be as per
notified and applicable accounting standards read with regulatory
guidelines/instructions issued by the respective regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per notified and applicable accounting standards read with regulatory guidelines/instructions issued by the respective regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed in this regard
controls.control_description:
In case the notified
applicable accounting standards or the respective regulator have not prescribed the
accounting treatment for credit derivative contracts, guidance, if any, issued by the
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India shall be followed in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such information, statement or clarification in the manner and format and within the time frame as may be specified by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Obligation to provide information sought by the Reserve Bank
The Reserve Bank may call for any information or statement or seek any clarification,
which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant, from persons or agencies dealing
in credit derivatives contracts, including eligible participants, and such persons, agencies
and participants shall furnish such information, statement or clarification in the manner
and format and within the time frame as may be specified by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such information, statement or clarification in the manner and format and within the time frame as may be specified by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure in public interest, publish any anonymised data related to transactions in credit derivatives market
controls.control_description:
(i) The Reserve Bank, or any other person or agency authorised by the Reserve Bank,
may in public interest, publish any anonymised data related to transactions in credit
derivatives market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in public interest, publish any anonymised data related to transactions in credit derivatives market

controls.control_objective: To ensure publish the notional value of credit derivative contracts outstanding for each debt instrument on a daily basis
controls.control_description:
(ii) CCIL shall publish the notional value of credit derivative contracts outstanding for
each debt instrument on a daily basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to publish the notional value of credit derivative contracts outstanding for each debt instrument on a daily basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the credit derivatives m
controls.control_description:
Violation of Directions
In the event of any person or agency violating any provision of these Directions or the
provisions of any other applicable law, the Reserve Bank may, in addition to taking any
penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from
dealing in the credit derivatives market for a period not exceeding one month at a time,
after providing reasonable opportunity to the person or agency to defend its actions, and
such action will be made public by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the credit derivatives m

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all credit derivative transactions entered into from the date the directions come into effect
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to all credit derivative transactions entered into from the
date the Directions come into effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all credit derivative transactions entered into from the date the directions come into effect
